description_long: This object consists of three visually striking swords, each with a long, single-edged blade and a rectangular, perforated handle. The top sword features a slightly curved blade with a metallic finish and a distinctive orange accent running along the spine, while the middle sword has a gold-edged blade and a black tip, with a matching gold and black handle. The bottom sword is straight with a gold and black striped blade, and a matching handle. All three swords have prominent guards separating the blade from the handle, and the handles are designed with a series of rectangular cutouts, giving them a modern, stylized appearance. The blades are metallic and reflective, with some colored accents for visual distinction. These swords appear decorative or ceremonial, with a blend of traditional and contemporary design elements.
description: A set of three stylized swords with metallic blades, colored accents, and rectangular, perforated handles. Each sword features a prominent guard and unique blade detailing.
description_view_0: Three swords are shown side by side, highlighting the full length of their blades and the distinctive colored accents and handle designs.
description_view_1: The swords are viewed from the tip, showing the thinness of the blades and the symmetrical alignment of the guards and handles.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the swords is visible, emphasizing the blade curvature, colored spines, and the geometric handle cutouts.
description_view_3: A direct view from the handle end, focusing on the guard shapes and the alignment of the handles' perforations.
attribute_blade_type: single-edged, straight and slightly curved, non-serrated
attribute_handle_design: rectangular, perforated, straight, likely plastic or composite with geometric cutouts
attribute_ornamentation: colored accents, gold striping, geometric handle cutouts
